disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No food or fluid intake for approximately 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: When did she last eat or drink?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She hasn't had anything to eat or drink for about two days now — nothing at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-syncope on sitting or standing; bedbound and unable to stand safely
trigger_question_examples: What happens when she tries to sit or stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Every time she tries to sit up or stand she goes dizzy and feels like she'll faint, so she's just staying flat in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Markedly reduced urine output with a very dry mouth
trigger_question_examples: Has she been passing urine normally?
Does she seem dehydrated — dry mouth, not going to the toilet?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's barely been to the toilet at all today and her mouth looks really dry.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing heartbeat reported by the patient and seen on a wearable
trigger_question_examples: Has she checked her pulse or heart rate on a device?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her heart feels like it's pounding and her watch is showing around 110.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient states she sees no point in sustaining her body and has deliberately stopped self-care; passive, not an active plan to end her life
trigger_question_examples: Has she said anything about not wanting to keep going?
Does she feel life isn't worth living, or has she thought about harming herself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She keeps saying there's no point keeping her body going and nothing she does matters. She hasn't talked about actually hurting herself — she's just given up looking after herself.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: She goes quiet and says it doesn't matter and you wouldn't understand.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute stressor — a significant political/advocacy setback one week ago preceded the collapse in self-care
trigger_question_examples: Did something happen recently that set this off?
Has anything changed for her in the last week or two?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: About a week ago there was a big setback in her advocacy work and she took it really hard — like all her effort was pointless.
